evidence.quote: OpenAI 发言人表示，搁置原因是企业对当地监管政策与高昂能源成本心存顾虑。
英国政府当时在新闻稿中宣称，承载星际之门项目的人工智能增长区“预计将吸引 300 亿英镑投资”。其中 100 亿英镑由黑石集团承诺出资，黑石正在该片区开发另一处独立数据中心（该数据中心项目与 OpenAI 无关，目前仍在推进）；剩余 200 亿英镑，则被描述为“未来合作方有望追加的潜在投资”。
OpenAI 发言人仅援引项目搁置时发布的旧声明回应《卫报》：“我们十分看好英国人工智能产业的发展前景…… 我们仍会持续评估英国星际之门项目，待监管、能源成本等条件成熟，能够支撑长期基础设施投入时，再推进落地。”

fields.value: GTM teams needed to find the right documents across fragmented tools, web pages and drives
Users ask the GTM AI Assistant questions to retrieve knowledge and structured sales and marketing data, replacing custom SQL or analyst support for complex analysis
GTM teams needed to find the right documents across fragmented tools, web pages and drives
At GA launch: 6 semantic views with 48 tables and ~1,400 columns; post-GA expanded to 10 semantic views with 64 tables and more than 1,750 columns

value: Answered more than 330,000 questions by year-end 2025
Over 35,000 questions per week for more than 2,500 weekly active users by end of 2025
Average questions per weekly active user grew from 8.5 to 14
>70% weekly active user retention rate in beta
77% of launched users tried the agent at least once by year-end; over 90% across primary personas
Equivalent of 65+ full-time employees' worth of annual productivity

evidence.quote: In mid-2025, we launched the Snowflake GTM AI Assistant to roughly 6,000 users across our sales and marketing organization — our first full-scale enterprise deployment of Snowflake Intelligence.

Company

Leadership & Board
Careers
Investor Relations

Newsroom
Environmental, Social & Governance
Snowflake Ventures
End Data Disparity
Snowflake Summit 26
We started in late February 2025 with a narrow goal: build a RAG-based knowledge assistant so GTM teams could find the right documents across fragmented tools, web pages and drives.
By late May 2025, we made the decision to pursue a full GTM AI assistant using Snowflake Intelligence — not only indexing knowledge content but also integrating structured sales and marketing data.

When we launched the AI assistant in mid-September 2025, it was powered by six semantic views with 48 tables and ~1,400 columns. After GA, we launched 40+ new features/data sources, expanding the data layer to 10 semantic views with 64 tables and more than 1,750 columns.
By year-end, the assistant had already answered more than 330,000 questions, helping users work faster and make better decisions.
